title: The Trail of the Lonesome Pine
summaries: "The Trail of the Lonesome Pine" by Jr. John Fox is a romance novel published in 1908. Set in the Appalachian Mountains, the story unfolds amid a decades-long blood feud between two mountain families. When outsider geologist John Hale arrives seeking coal and fortune, he becomes captivated by the beautiful June Tolliver and entangled in local conflicts. As industrialization threatens old mountain ways, June must choose between clan loyalty and love, while Hale's push for law and order clashes with century-old traditions.
